assignments.name: Add_Record_to_List_for_Insert
assignments.label: Add Record to List for Insert

decisions.name: Repeater_Screens_vs_Number_of_Sites
decisions.label: Repeater Screens vs Number of Sites

Flow.description:
Created child Account and Subs in JungleGym and Salesforce after Create Account and Subscription button creates parent account in JG
03/31/26 - AC - Removing updates to the account from this flow
Flow.interviewLabel: Opportunity - Screen - Create JungleGym Child Sites {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Opportunity - Screen - Create JungleGym Child Sites

fields.name: repeaterTitle
fields.fieldText:
CREATE CHILD SITE RECORDS


Based on the Number of Schools provided, you now need to create {!childSitesToBeCreated} child sites.

﻿Please make sure to create that exact number of child sites by clicking the "+ Add" button and filling in all the required fields.

fields.name: orgUpdates
fields.fieldText: New Accounts will be created under Org UUID: {!Get_Opp_Record.Account.School_Object__r.Brightwheel_Org_UUID__c}

fields.name: Existing_Account
fields.helpText: If there is an existing account for this child site, select it here

fields.name: CSCExistText
fields.fieldText: Child Sites for this Opportunity have already been created. Proceed to Close Win the Opportunity when you're ready.

fields.name: parentTotal1
fields.fieldText: Parent Amount: {!parentTotal}

fields.name: siteNumberMismatch
fields.fieldText:
🚨🚨🚨

Oops! It looks like the number of child sites you entered doesn’t match the number that needs to be created. Please go back to the previous screen and update it accordingly. Thank you!


Number of Child Sites Needed: {!childSitesToBeCreated}

Number of Child Sites Entered So Far: {!childSiteCount}

variables.description: Capture Opportunity information for Site Add in order to pre-populate repeater
variables.name: colSiteAddOpp
